about.lead: I’m a product-minded engineer who cares about details, clarity, and finishing.
paragraphs: I like working end-to-end: shaping the problem, designing the interface, implementing the system, and polishing the experience.
My default approach is simple: ship something useful, measure, iterate, and keep the codebase calm.
Outside of work, I enjoy reading, walking, and collecting small design inspirations.

experience.description: Owned key product areas, improved performance, and shipped user-facing features with high quality.
Built internal tools and improved developer experience through better tooling and documentation.

contact.blurb: If you’re building something and want help, I’d love to chat.
